title: oxalis scopulorum
intro: Oxalis scopulorum, also known as the rock wood-sorrel, is a species of flowering plant in the wood sorrel family (Oxalidaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Oxalis scopulorum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, as well as having antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Oxalis scopulorum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
